Ranji Trophy Rethink After Triple Hundred and Eight Sixes

Nov 13, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Ranji Trophy Rethink After Triple Hundred and Eight Sixes

A rare combination of a triple century and a separate innings featuring eight consecutive sixes has triggered widespread calls for a Ranji Trophy format review. Critics argue that pitch quality and competition balance require deeper evaluation.
